data.sql: SELECT material_code,material_name,abc_type,stock_rule,category,spec, unit,company, sum(ok_qty) as ok_qty,sum(ng_qty) as ng_qty,sum(allot_qty) as allot_qty, sum(frozen_qty) as frozen_qty,sum(usable_qty) as usable_qty FROM ( SELECT b.code AS material_code,b.name AS material_name,b.abc_type,b.category,b.spec,b.stock_rule, u.name as unit,c.name as company, a.ok_qty,a.ng_qty,a.allot_qty,a.frozen_qty,a.usable_qty FROM stock_onhand a LEFT JOIN md_material b ON a.material_id = b.id LEFT JOIN md_unit u on b.unit_id = u.id LEFT JOIN res_company c on a.company_id = c.id ${WHERE} ) v GROUP BY material_code,material_name,abc_type,stock_rule,category,spec,unit,company
SELECT count(1) FROM stock_onhand a JOIN md_material b on a.material_id=b.id ${WHERE} GROUP BY a.material_id,a.company_id

SELECT b.code AS material_code,b.name AS material_name,b.abc_type,b.category,b.spec, u.name as unit,co.name as company,w.code AS warehouse_code,w.name AS warehouse_name,l.code AS location, a.lot_num,c.product_date,c.product_lot,a.status,c.quality_status,a.sn, a.ok_qty,a.ng_qty,a.allot_qty,a.frozen_qty,a.usable_qty FROM stock_onhand a LEFT JOIN md_material b ON a.material_id = b.id LEFT JOIN lbl_material_label c ON a.label_id = c.id LEFT JOIN md_unit u on b.unit_id = u.id LEFT JOIN md_warehouse w ON a.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN md_store_location l ON a.location_id = l.id LEFT JOIN res_company co on a.company_id = co.id ${WHERE}

SELECT count(1) FROM stock_onhand a LEFT JOIN md_material b ON a.material_id = b.id LEFT JOIN lbl_material_label c ON a.label_id = c.id LEFT JOIN md_unit u on b.unit_id = u.id LEFT JOIN md_warehouse w ON a.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN md_store_location l ON a.location_id = l.id LEFT JOIN res_company co on a.company_id = co.id ${WHERE}

SELECT material_code,material_name,abc_type,category,spec,warehouse_code,warehouse_name,unit,company, sum(ok_qty) as ok_qty,sum(ng_qty) as ng_qty,sum(allot_qty) as allot_qty, sum(frozen_qty) as frozen_qty,sum(usable_qty) as usable_qty FROM (SELECT b.code AS material_code,b.name AS material_name,b.abc_type,b.category,b.spec, u.name as unit,c.name as company,w.code AS warehouse_code,w.name AS warehouse_name, a.ok_qty,a.ng_qty,a.allot_qty,a.frozen_qty,a.usable_qty FROM stock_onhand a LEFT JOIN md_material b ON a.material_id = b.id LEFT JOIN md_unit u on b.unit_id = u.id LEFT JOIN md_warehouse w ON a.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN res_company c on a.company_id = c.id ${WHERE} ) v GROUP BY warehouse_code, warehouse_name, material_code, material_name, abc_type, category, spec, unit, company
SELECT count(1) FROM stock_onhand a JOIN md_material b on a.material_id=b.id ${WHERE} GROUP BY a.warehouse_id,a.material_id,a.company_id

SELECT detail.material_id, detail.return_id, detail.receipt_id, detail.iqc_id, detail.stock_in_id, detail.product_storage_notice_id, detail.material_return_id, sum(detail.qty) AS qty, sum(detail.return_qty) AS return_qty, sum(detail.qty) - sum(detail.return_qty) AS should_stock_qty, sum(detail.stock_qty) AS stock_qty, sum(detail.qty) - sum(detail.return_qty) - sum(detail.stock_qty)AS wait_stock_qty, max(detail.id) as id, base.code as code, base.type, mm.code as material_code, mm.name as material_name, mm.spec , iqc.code as iqc_code, mpsi.code as product_stock_in_code, mmr.code as material_return_code, wmr.code as receipt_code, wsr.code as return_code FROM `stock_stock_in_details` detail LEFT JOIN stock_stock_in base on base.id = detail.stock_in_id LEFT JOIN md_material mm on detail.material_id = mm.id LEFT JOIN iqc_sheet iqc on iqc.id = detail.iqc_id LEFT JOIN mfg_product_storage_notice mpsi on mpsi.id = detail.product_storage_notice_id LEFT JOIN mfg_material_return mmr on mmr.id = detail.material_return_id LEFT JOIN wms_material_receipt wmr on wmr.id = detail.receipt_id LEFT JOIN wms_sales_return wsr on wsr.id = detail.return_id ${WHERE} GROUP BY detail.material_id, detail.return_id, detail.receipt_id, detail.iqc_id, detail.stock_in_id, detail.material_return_id, detail.product_storage_notice_id, detail.material_return_id, base.type, base.code

select count(1) from ( SELECT count(1) FROM `stock_stock_in_details` detail LEFT JOIN stock_stock_in base on base.id = detail.stock_in_id ${WHERE} GROUP BY detail.material_id, detail.return_id, detail.receipt_id, detail.iqc_id, detail.stock_in_id, detail.material_return_id, detail.product_storage_notice_id, detail.material_return_id ) a

SELECT sum(detail.qty) AS qty FROM `stock_stock_in_details` detail ${WHERE} GROUP BY detail.material_id, detail.return_id, detail.receipt_id, detail.iqc_id, detail.stock_in_id, detail.material_return_id, detail.product_storage_notice_id, detail.material_return_id
